summary: Backend-only verification completed for P0 wh_5a repair-complete route fix. All 60 tests pass across 4 targeted test files. The fix correctly: (1) bypasses LLM/diagnostic prompt entirely on completion-offer turns via buildAuthoritativeCompletionOffer(), (2) emits deterministic server-built completion response without 'Step 6' or 'Status: Isolation not completed' stale text, (3) uses repaired/restored terminal state as final-report source of truth after START FINAL REPORT.
critical_code_review_comments: route.ts:78-135 buildAuthoritativeCompletionOffer() correctly builds deterministic completion response without LLM call
route.ts:544-551 correctly derives authoritativeDiagnosticCompletionResponse when isolationComplete && action=offer_completion
route.ts:622-646 correctly short-circuits the primary LLM path and streams deterministic completion output instead
context-engine.ts:536-544 P1.7 TERMINAL STATE FINAL ENFORCEMENT correctly clears activeStepId and sets isolationComplete=true
Tests correctly verify: fetchTriggered=false (no LLM call), no 'Step 6', no 'Status: Isolation not completed' in output
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 wh_5a repair-complete route fix verified. Key behaviors: (1) Route now bypasses LLM entirely for diagnostic completion-offer turns using buildAuthoritativeCompletionOffer() at route.ts:78-135. (2) The exact Russian transcript 'Был неисправен предохранитель. Я заменил. Теперь водонагреватель работает. Проблема устранена' at wh_5a correctly triggers terminal state with fetchTriggered=false (no LLM call). (3) Output contains 'START FINAL REPORT' but NOT 'Step 6' or 'Status: Isolation not completed'. (4) START FINAL REPORT after terminal state uses deriveFinalReportAuthorityFacts() for repaired/restored state as source of truth.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: The stale 'Status: Isolation not completed' and 'Step 6' strings were coming from the normal diagnostic prompt path (MODE_PROMPT_DIAGNOSTIC.txt:97-103, 146-172). Even after terminal state latched, if the route asked the model in diagnostic mode, the base prompt file could still push stale formatting. Fix: route.ts now bypasses the LLM entirely for diagnostic completion-offer turns by checking (currentMode === 'diagnostic' && isolationComplete && action === 'offer_completion') and streaming a deterministic server-built completion response via buildAuthoritativeCompletionOffer().
